messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Add Approve/Amend/Reject inline-keyboard buttons to the ApprovalRequested Telegram message
What it solves: UX polish on top of BL-408 (approve works) and BL-409 (reject/amend
verbs): add a Telegram inline keyboard (Approve / Amend / Reject buttons)
to the ApprovalRequested message itself, so the human can tap instead of
typing a reply. Typed replies (BL-408/BL-409) must keep working
unchanged — this is …
How it works: An ApprovalRequested message carries Approve, Amend, and Reject buttons

messages.author: swarm
